name: CV Sciences, Inc.
business: CV Sciences, Inc. is a consumer wellness company specializing in nutraceuticals and plant-based foods. It sells hemp extracts and other natural ingredients through B2B and B2C channels, with brands including +PlusCBD, +PlusHLTH, Cultured Foods, and Lunar Fox. Additionally, it manufactures encapsulated softgels and tinctures for the supplement and nutrition industry.

exposures.sentence: Our +PlusCBD branded products are sold at select retail locations throughout the U.S. and are the top-selling brands of hemp extracts in the natural products market, according to SPINS, the leading provider of syndicated data and insights for the natural, organic and specialty products industry.
We also have a dormant drug development program focused on developing and commercializing CBD-based novel therapeutics, which may be pursued further, subject to available capital.
We are also a manufacturer of encapsulated softgels and tinctures for the supplement and nutrition industry.

catalysts.event: Regulatory change prohibiting sale of hemp-derived products with more than 0.4 mg total THC per container after November 12, 2026
catalysts.sentence: The changes take effect November 12, 2026, creating a one-year transition period.

catalysts.event: Amendment of secured promissory notes to include conversion feature
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, the Company amended the Note and the New Note (collectively, the Notes ) to include a conversion feature pursuant to which the outstanding balance of the Notes may be converted into shares of common stock of the Company at a fixed conversion price of $0.06 per share.

catalysts.event: Launch of Lunar Fox brand in the U.S. market
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, we launched Lunar Fox , a brand that is focused on distribution of plant-based products in the U.S. market.
